violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Establishment was only approved for pre-packaged goods. Establishment is to stop any food prep, cooking, or hot holding until approval from RIDOH is granted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is not approved for any food prep or cooking. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM once approval from RIDOH is granted. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The kitchen/prep area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Hand washing sink must be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2026

Queso fresco and "requeso" cheese was observed from an unapproved source. All cheese was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is only to purchase food for approved sources. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods tortillas in the 1 door reach-in. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs were moved to bottom shelf at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Pastelitos were observed held between 85-115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Pastelitos were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by dead cockroaches on sticky traps. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control and is to increase pest control as frequently as needed to eliminate pests. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The door to the outside, located in the main entrance and back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The walk-in cooler handle, and 3-bay sink faucet was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
The floor in the retail area and storage area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/23/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen and storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The presence of pests is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings, roach carcasses and live roaches. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025

The floor in the retail area have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
The floor in the dry storage area is in poor repair, observed cracks with exposed wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment (chest freezers) were observed in the retail area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
